generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former intelligence analyst with 20 years in strategic planning, I've seen firsthand how critical it is to strengthen our strategic autonomy. The recent cyber attacks on our infrastructure prove we can't rely solely on allies. We need to invest in domestic capabilities now - every day we delay is a day we're less secure. The alternative is playing catch-up while our adversaries gain ground. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
